name: Pecan Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the pecans and bread crumbs separately in a blender until finely ground.
2. Chop the onion and potatoes into soymilk (soaked) in the blender until finely chopped.
3. Add the chopped onion and potatoes to the mixture of ground pecans and bread crumbs.
4. Mix in the soy flour, salt, and sage until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Dot the top with small pea-sized pieces of margarine.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Serve with brown gravy.
